reason: Question asks which vehicles may park where signs are installed 'з такими табличками' (with SUCH plates) — a deictic reference to specific depicted parking plates (7.6.x pictograms). The correct answer (cars AND motorcycles, opts 3+4) is determined by which plate pictograms are shown, which the text never spells out. Not self-contained; no candidate images exist to verify. Must be held.
